text.tspan: Discriminatory attitudes towards people living with HIV, 2020
Share of the population who hold discriminatory attitudes towards people living with HIV . This is measured as
those who answer "no" to the question: "Would you buy fresh vegetables from a shopkeeper or vendor if you
knew that this person had HIV?". This share is based only on those who had previously heard of HIV.
Data source: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (2024)
